# setCreatorBundleID(_:)

**Instance Method**

Set the creatorBundleID property.

## Declaration

```swift
func setCreatorBundleID(_ ID: String) throws
```

## Parameters

- **ID**: A String that contains the bundle ID of the plug-in that instantiated the object.
